visa: Refund requests must be processed within 30 days. Escalate all refund disputes over 30 days to the Dispute Team.
Any mention of unauthorized transactions, stolen cards, or fraudulent charges must be escalated to the Security Team immediately.
Address changes can be done via the online portal. Reply directly with a link to the portal.
hackerrank: Assessments require strict proctoring. If a camera fails, escalate to the Proctoring Team.
Login issues with 'Invalid Credentials' are user error. Reply directly guiding them to the 'Forgot Password' link.
Feature requests (e.g., dark mode) should be acknowledged politely and escalated to the Product Team.
HackerRank supports C++20 for all assessments.
Plagiarism flags must be escalated to the Academic Integrity Team for manual review.
claude: The maximum context window for Claude 3.5 Sonnet is 200,000 tokens.
For API key access, reply directly with a link to the Anthropic Developer Console.
Model hallucinations or incorrect logic output should be escalated to the AI Quality Assurance team.
AI Safety concerns or harmful outputs must be escalated immediately to the Trust and Safety Team.
Rate Limiting (429 errors) on free tiers is normal. Reply explaining the limits.
general_and_out_of_scope: If the query is completely unrelated to our products (e.g., spam, generic life questions, unsupported claims), reply directly stating that the issue is 'Out of Scope' and cannot be processed.
Do NOT escalate out-of-scope issues or spam. Reply directly to close the ticket.
